code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut first = true
  mut i = 0
  mut start = 0
  while i <= n
    let at_end = i == n
    mut is_space = false
    if not at_end
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        is_space = true
      end
    end
    if at_end or is_space
      if start < i
        let tok = string.substring(line, start, i)
        let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        let doubled = v * 2
        if first
          result = "#{doubled}"
          first = false
        else
          result = "#{result} #{doubled}"
        end
      end
      start = i + 1
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
end
